phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Torre do Vigia 3?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH TAW-rih DOO vee-ZHEEUH TREHSH?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Torre do Vigia 3.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih DOO vee-ZHEEUH TREHSH.

responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih DOO vee-ZHEEUH TREHSH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Torre do Vigia 3.

phrases.text_local: Onde ficam os passadiços de madeira?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng OOSH puh-suh-DEE-soosh DIH muh-DAY-ruh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para os passadiços de madeira ao longo da falésia.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH puh-suh-DEE-soosh DIH muh-DAY-ruh OW LOHNG-goo DUH fuh-LEHZ-yuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the wooden walkways along the cliff.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the wooden walkways along the cliff.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH puh-suh-DEE-soosh DIH muh-DAY-ruh OW LOHNG-goo DUH fuh-LEHZ-yuh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para os passadiços de madeira ao longo da falésia.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Protected Dunes Zone is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a Zona de Dunas Protegidas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH ZOH-nuh DIH DOO-nuhsh proo-tih-ZHEE-duhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Environmental zones are clearly marked; staff direct visitors to preserve fragile ecosystems.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, após os passadiços de madeira.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, uh-PAWSH OOSH puh-suh-DEE-soosh DIH muh-DAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, past the wooden boardwalks.

responses.english: Good morning, past the wooden boardwalks.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, uh-PAWSH OOSH puh-suh-DEE-soosh DIH muh-DAY-ruh.
responses.local: Bom dia, após os passadiços de madeira.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Escadaria de Acesso 5?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH shkuh-duh-REEUH DIH uh-SEH-soo SEEN-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese beach staff typically give concise landmark-based directions without extra pleasantries.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Escadaria de Acesso 5.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH shkuh-duh-REEUH DIH uh-SEH-soo SEEN-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Access Staircase 5.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Access Staircase 5.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH shkuh-duh-REEUH DIH uh-SEH-soo SEEN-koo.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Escadaria de Acesso 5.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Parque de Estacionamento Este?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW PAH-ruh-kih DIH shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too EHSH-tih?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Parque de Estacionamento Este.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW PAH-ruh-kih DIH shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too EHSH-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the East Parking Lot.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the East Parking Lot.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW PAH-ruh-kih DIH shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too EHSH-tih.
